status.pending: {count, plural, one {# change not sent yet} other {# changes not sent yet}}
status.pendingMedia: {count, plural, one {# photo not sent yet} other {# photos not sent yet}}
status.offline: No connection. Changes are saved on this device.

banner.warning: Last connected {relative}. This may not be the latest data.
banner.stale: No connection for a long time. What you see here could be far behind.

rejected.banner: {count, plural, one {# change was rejected by the server. Tap to view.} other {# changes were rejected by the server. Tap to view.}}
rejected.title: Rejected Changes
rejected.explain: The changes below were rejected by the server and will not be sent. They stay saved on this device as a record.

quarantine.title: Changes On Hold
quarantine.body: Some changes from another device failed verification, so they aren’t shown yet. Report this to the store owner.
